decks.notes: The primary focus of this deck is to put pressure on the opponent quickly with a low mana cost aggressive strategy. The deck includes cards that can disrupt the opponent's hand while also providing removal options. The creatures in the deck are powerful and can quickly overwhelm the opponent if left unchecked. The deck also includes ways to generate additional mana and search for key pieces to maintain its aggressive strategy. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive playstyle of the deck.

The deck focuses on quickly casting cheap creatures like Hollow One and Vengevine, using cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting to discard cards and potentially bring back Vengevine from the graveyard. Lightning Bolt provides removal and burn, while the deck's land base includes fetch lands to thin the deck and increase the chances of drawing threats. The goal is to swarm the opponent with multiple creatures early in the game and deal enough damage to win before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling and executing a powerful combo using cards like Allosaurus Rider, Neoform, and Eldritch Evolution to cheat out big creatures like Griselbrand or Hooting Mandrills. It includes a variety of ways to protect the combo, such as Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer, while also having tools to disrupt the opponent with cards like Endurance and Consign to Memory. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its explosive plays and win the game in a single turn.

The main idea of the deck is centered around using control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up a win condition through card advantage and controlling the board. The deck includes a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler. The inclusion of Isochron Scepter allows for repeatable spells, while Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive provide card selection and advantage. The overall strategy is to maintain control of the game through disruption and card advantage until the opponent is overwhelmed.

This deck aims to ramp up quickly using Eldrazi creatures and control the game through various spells like Fight Rigging, Kozilek's Command, and Malevolent Rumble. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog, Emrakul, and Kozilek while also utilizing cards like Disciple of Freyalise to generate mana and Fanatic of Rhonas to cheat them into play. With a mix of control and ramp elements, this deck seeks to dominate the late game and overpower the opponent.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with cards like Street Wraith and Burning Inquiry in order to cheat out powerful creatures like Hollow One and Vengevine. The aggressive nature of the deck is complemented by cards like Lightning Bolt for removal and Practiced Offense for extra damage. The deck also has some resilience with Detective's Phoenix and Ox of Agonas for card advantage and Marauding Mako for a big creature threat. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early pressure and explosive plays.

Utilize fast mana generation and card draw to quickly assemble the combo pieces necessary for a powerful turn. By generating mana with rituals and reducing the cost of spells with Ruby Medallion, the deck aims to cast multiple copies of Ral, Monsoon Mage to deal a large amount of damage to the opponent. Cards like Wrenn's Resolve and Reckless Impulse help dig for combo pieces, while Past in Flames allows for a second chance to cast spells from the graveyard. The goal is to win the game in a single explosive turn.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on fast-paced aggression and efficient card selection to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It features low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, supported by burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck also utilizes cantrips like Expressive Iteration and Preordain to maintain card advantage and find key pieces. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and card selection, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain momentum throughout the game.

This deck aims to control the game by utilizing the powerful UrzaTron lands to ramp up quickly and play big threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Karn, the Great Creator. With a mix of removal spells like Dismember and Kozilek's Command, as well as disruptive creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Glaring Fleshraker, the deck can disrupt the opponent's game plan while accelerating its own. The deck also includes cards like All Is Dust and Chalice of the Void to further control the board and shut down opposing strategies.

The deck focuses on assembling the powerful Amulet Titan combo, which involves using Amulet of Vigor to generate mana and play multiple lands per turn. By ramping up with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Primeval Titan, the deck aims to quickly find its win conditions like Scapeshift or Malevolent Rumble to overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Gruul Turf to support the combo and protect against disruption. The key strategy is to efficiently ramp up mana and combo off to win the game in a explosive fashion.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up your mana to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures while controlling the board with removal spells and other disruptive effects. By using cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Eldrazi Temple, you can quickly accelerate your mana and drop big threats like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Emrakul, the Promised End. Combining this with control elements like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Kozilek's Command, you can disrupt your opponent's game plan while ramping up your own to overwhelm them with massive creatures.

The deck focuses on using reanimation spells like Persist and Unearth to bring powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones onto the battlefield quickly. It also includes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game and protect the combo. Faithless Looting and Preordain help dig for combo pieces, while lands like Watery Grave and Polluted Delta ensure mana consistency. The goal is to efficiently reanimate big threats and overwhelm the opponent while disrupting their game plan to secure a victory.

The main strategy of this deck is to use ramp cards like Eldrazi Temple and Green Sun's Zenith to quickly get out powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul and Ulamog. The deck also includes control elements like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Fight Rigging to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The combination of ramp and control elements allows the deck to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats while maintaining control of the game state.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal, card draw, and ramp. It aims to slow down the opponent's strategy while setting up its own win condition with cards like Wilderness Reclamation and Planar Genesis. Teferi, Time Raveler is a key card for disrupting the opponent's plays and protecting your own spells. The deck also has some versatile removal options like Prismatic Ending and Solitude, as well as card draw with Consult the Star Charts and Sphinx's Revelation. Overall, the strategy revolves around maintaining control of the game until you can secure a victory.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using Goryo's Vengeance and instant speed spells like Ephemerate. Atraxa, Grand Unifier is a key piece of the combo, helping to reduce the cost of your spells and protect your creatures. The deck also runs disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to control the game while setting up the combo. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells, ultimately leading to victory through swift and decisive plays.

The deck focuses on using ramp spells and mana acceleration to quickly play powerful Eldrazi creatures, overwhelming opponents with huge threats. It also includes control elements like counterspells and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to establish early board presence and control the pace of the game, eventually winning through the sheer power of the Eldrazi creatures. The deck aims to out-value and out-muscle opponents, using its ramp and control elements to dominate the battlefield and secure victory.
